title: Membrane
description: Makes bats drop phantom membranes, and optionally disables phantoms completely.
body:
# Membrane

[![Kinetic Hosting](https://www.jewelexx.com/discount.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=570)

Makes bats drop phantom membranes, and optionally disables phantoms completely, simultaneously making bats not useless, and removing pesky phantoms.

## Companion Pack
Membrane has an optional companion resource pack that changes the name of "Phantom Membrane"s to just "Membrane"s. You can download it [from GitHub](https://github.com/jewlexx/membrane/releases/latest).

**Made with 💗 by Juliette Cordor**
